title: Etoiles universe
description: Live your adventure as if you were etoiles himself
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19f20f86253c609ed76801ea022e2222677066da.png)

![separation bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3d26893a3d7bf3516c54ea3e59bb33de9303869.png)

**_This mod require curios and croptopia_**

Just a mod who add some etoiles disc and etoiles blocks

 

You can now listen to "Diamonds" sung by étoiles with the new disc and have the famous Etoiles in a bed/ Etoiles Statue and plush to decorate your base !

 

This mod is created for a Fan server

 ![separation bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3d26893a3d7bf3516c54ea3e59bb33de9303869.png)

THIS IS A FAN MOD

If you want to use this mod in your mod pack, please, credit me

 

[Diamonds - Etoiles Cover Origin. ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rMdrwlIVtkc&ab_channel=leoMCteam)
